briefdescription.para: This function demonstrates the usage Traffic Generator It does the following:

para.verbatim: - Set up the output terminal if UART16550 is in the hardware build - Initialize the AXI Traffic Generator device - Fill's the Target memory with required data - Enable the Traffic generation - Disable the Traffic generation - Return test status and exit

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the XTrafGen component.
is Device ID of the Axi Traffic Generator Device,
is a pointer to the instance of the XTrafGen component.
contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: -XST_SUCCESS to indicate success -XST_FAILURE to indicate failure
In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

detaileddescription.para: This function is the main entry of the traffic generator test.

briefdescription.para: This file demonstrates how to use the xtrafgen driver on the Xilinx AXI Traffic Generator core.

detaileddescription.para: The AXI Traffic Generator IP is designed to generate AXI4 traffic which can be used to stress different modules/ interconnect connected in the system.

This example demonstrates how to use the Static mode in the Axi Traffic Generator.In Static mode the core continuously generates fixed address and fixed INCR type read and write transfers based on the burst length configured.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- ------------------------------------------------------- 1.01a adk 03/09/13 First release 2.00a adk 16/09/13 Fixed CR:737291 4.1 ms 01/23/17 Modified xil_printf statement in main function to ensure that "Successfully ran" and "Failed" strings are available in all examples. This is a fix for CR-965028. ms 04/05/17 Added tabspace for return statements in functions for proper documentation while generating doxygen. 4.9 vlt 12/18/25 Update Doxygen comments to include SDT flow details. vlt 01/27/26 Fixed codespell issues.
